---
title: "Professional Resume"
---

<div class="no-print" style="margin-bottom: 30px;">
  <a class="btn btn-primary" href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" role="button">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF Resume
  </a>
</div>

## Professional Summary

Highly motivated and technologically driven Actuarial Science professional with a strong dual competency in financial risk modeling and modern backend software engineering. Proven capability in structuring relational databases, validating enterprise datasets, and building highly scalable production APIs. Technical foundation encompasses core life insurance principles, liability reserving frameworks, and IFRS 17 reporting guidelines, combined with extensive experience engineering data-driven applications to automate traditional actuarial methodologies.

---

## Core Competencies & Technical Stack

* **Actuarial & Quantitative Analysis:** Loss Reserving, Liability Projections, Premium Pricing Frameworks, Statistical Modeling, Life Insurance Principles, IFRS 17 Reporting Guidelines.
* **Programming Languages:** Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn), R (Tidyverse, Stats), SQL (PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server, T-SQL).
* **Software & Systems Engineering:** RESTful API Development (FastAPI, Django), Database Design, Relational Data Structuring, Integration Testing (Postman).
* **Data Science & Visualization:** Predictive Modeling, Random Forest Classification, Linear & Logistic Regression, Streamlit UI Engineering, Power BI, Tableau.
* **Techniques & Methodologies:** Data Validation, Statistical Inference, Framework Optimization, Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) & $R^2$ Evaluation Metrics.

---

## Technical Projects

### Insurance Claims Reserving Model
* **Methodology & Tools:** Python, Pandas, Regression Modeling.
* **Execution:** Engineered an end-to-end regression model to project long-tail claims liabilities for insurance structures. Validated predictive robustness using RMSE and $R^2$ metrics to optimize traditional reserving matrices.

### Interactive Portfolio Risk & Volatility Dashboard
* **Methodology & Tools:** Advanced SQL Protocols, Tableau.
* **Execution:** Designed and deployed an interactive analytics interface to present granular financial risk exposure metrics and portfolio volatility profiles. Leveraged advanced SQL pipelines to transform, filter, and pipe historical financial asset data seamlessly.

### Health Risk Prediction Engine & Web Application
* **Methodology & Tools:** Python, FastAPI, Streamlit, Scikit-Learn.
* **Execution:** Architected a multi-page web application leveraging a modular FastAPI backend architecture to process multi-feature health inputs. Developed, trained, and deployed a tuned Random Forest Classifier optimized for classification recall and structural reliability.

---

## Education & Professional Credentials

### Professional Actuarial Qualifications
* **Institute and Faculty of Actuaries (IFoA, UK)**
  * Professional Actuarial Papers: CS1 (Actuarial Statistics) & CM1 (Actuarial Mathematics) — *In Progress*

### Academic Background
* **The Catholic University of Eastern Africa (CUEA)**
  * Bachelor of Science in Actuarial Science (Honours) | Graduation: 2025

### Technical Certifications
* **DATASCIENCE BOOTCAMP**
  * Professional Certification in Data Science | 2025
* **Kanunga High School**
  * Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE)
